description: Role templates aligned with scripts/seed_roles.py. Import in screening to pre-fill JD and extraction fields.

templates.jd_description: Build and maintain reliable APIs and services. Strong Python (FastAPI or similar), SQL/Postgres, REST design, automated testing, and production deployments. Bonus: experience with LLM APIs, async I/O, or high-throughput data pipelines.

extraction_fields.label: Education summary
extraction_fields.description: Highest degree and institution in one line.
